entry.title: New: RES26-037 (Honolulu) — BUD
entry.content:
APPROVING THE WRITE-OFF OF UNCOLLECTED ACCOUNTS OWED TO THE CITY.

The Department of Budget and Fiscal Services, Division of Treasury has determined that the City has uncollectible accounts in excess of $1 ,000 as of June 30, 2025, totaling $1,290,962.30, that must be referred to the City Council for write-off approval.

Latest action: CR-47(26) Reported out for adoption.

View on the council site
